# PERF-145 negative: propagate context via a middleware that doesn't reallocate the request
lang: go
file: PERF-145-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

func Middleware(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
	return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		ctx := context.WithValue(r.Context(), "userID", 42)
		// Use a request-scoped context attached to the request only
		// when the value actually changes. Most call sites do not
		// need r.WithContext; reading the context from the request
		// is enough.
		_ = ctx
		next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
	})
}
